LAW AND MOTION 301, EVIDENTIARY HEARING HELD: DEFENDANT VESNA SABANOVIC AND MARIA SABANOVIC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT VESNA SABANOVIC AND MARIA SABANOVIC HAVE APPEARED THROUGH THEIR DECLARATIONS; THE UNLAWFUL DETAINER IS BASED ON A CURABLE BREACH. THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHALL NOT REMOVE OR EVICT DEFENDANT JASENCO SABANOVIC AND CLAIMANTS VESNA SABANOVIC AND MARIA SABANOVIC. A SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT SHALL BE FILED AND SERVED. ORDER SIGNED. calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ora S. Prochovnick, Esq. and Patricia Howard, Legal Intern, Housing Advocacy Clinic (415) 982-8399, for Defendant and Moving Party Sabanovic
Musa M. Ibrahim, Plaintiff Propria Persona
RULING:
EVIDENTIARY HEARING HELD: DEFENDANT VESNA SABANOVIC and MARIA SABANOVIC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION is GRANTED. The Court finds that Vesna Sabanovic and Maria Sabanovic have appeared through their declarations; the unlawful detainer is based on a curable breach. The Sheriff's Office shall not remove or evict Defendant Jasenco Sabanovic and Claimants Vesna Sabanovic and Maria Sabanovic. A supplemental complaint shall be filed and served. Order signed. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
